subject: Add 404/not-found page for invalid campaign and profile IDs
description: Currently visiting /campaign/invalid-id or /profile/invalid-id likely shows a broken page or empty state. Add a styled not-found component that shows when getCampaign/getProfile returns null: "Campaign not found" with illustration, link back to community page, and suggestion to browse active campaigns. Production polish that prevents embarrassment during demo.

changes: Created shared NotFound component at components/NotFound.jsx with contextual messages for campaign/profile/page types
Replaced bare text fallbacks in CampaignPage and ProfilePage with NotFound component
Replaced catch-all Navigate redirect in App.jsx with NotFound page for unknown routes
